trending_videos.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day - Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
A Brand New Day starts now.
Watch the official trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, exclusively in theatres July 31. Play Marvel’s Spider-Man 2, available now in the PlayStation Plus Game Catalog.

trending_videos.title: First Four: Maryland-Baltimore County vs. Howard
trending_videos.description: The No. 16 UMBC Retrievers face the No. 16 Howard Bison the NCAA Tournament First Four play-in game. This battle takes place at the UD Arena in Dayton, Ohio. The winner will advance to the Midwest Region to face the No. 1 seed Michigan Wolverines.

trending_videos.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Teaser Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters December 18 #DuneMovie #FilmedforIMAX

Directed by Denis Villeneuve and written by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, Dune: Part Three is based on the novel Dune Messiah by Frank Herbert and delivers the epic conclusion to Villeneuve’s trilogy. The film stars Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach De Bankolé, with Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Javier Bardem, and features newcomers Nakoa-Wolf Momoa and Ida Brooke.

trending_videos.title: Gutfeld!
trending_videos.description: Gutfeld! Looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features refreshing takes on the day's top headlines from FNC personalities, authors, politicians, veterans and comedians.

trending_videos.title: White Fox: The Kumiho Strikes Back | Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
trending_videos.description:
From the shadows comes the fox. 

As chaos spreads across New York, White Fox appears to establish order. A legendary nine-tailed fox and Director of Tiger Division, Ami Han brings sharp instincts, supernatural power, and unshakable resolve to the fight.  When Fisk crosses the line, the Kumiho strikes back.  

📅 Season 7: The hunt is on arrives on March 20 UTC!

Grace hides the ancient beast within... 

Play free now on:
🔹 Steam: https://t.co/IPhy0Of1cG
🔹 PlayStation: https://t.co/FR0aVfTmcn
🔹 Xbox: https://t.co/GaAYz7Nku6
🔹 Epic Games: https://t.co/QXoxz0VAP7

SPIDERMAN Brand New Day Official Trailer Breakdown | Easter Eggs, Story Explained & Things You Missed. We breakdown the Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer. This discusses the story, Hulk, Punisher, Sadie Sinks character, MJ, the comics and more.

#Spiderman #BrandNewDay #Trailer #SpidermanBrandNewDay #Marvel #MCU #PlotDetails #PlotLeak #MovieTrailer

Spider-Man: Brand New Day is an upcoming American superhero film based on the Marvel Comics character Spider-Man. Produced by Columbia Pictures, Marvel Studios, and Pascal Pictures, and distributed by Sony Pictures Releasing, it is intended to be the 38th film in the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU) and the fourth film in the MCU Spider-Man film series following Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021). top_channels.description: Content from a mix of official and entertainment channels.
insights: Channels with established brands have high viewership potential.
Emerging channels should focus on niche areas within these categories.

cross-content_creation.description: Creating content that bridges multiple trending categories.
potential: Combine movie trailer analysis with gaming content.

international_collaborations.description: Leveraging international music and entertainment trends.
potential: Collaboration with international artists for lyric videos.
Focus on subtitled content to reach wider audiences.
